title: bulbostylis humilis
intro: Bulbostylis humilis, also known as the Dwarf Club-rush or Small Club-rush, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, boils, and skin conditions. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and acting as a diuretic. In herbal preparations, Bulbostylis humilis is often used as an infusion or decoction to make teas and remedies that can be used to treat various ailments.
